genres.name: Science Fiction
genres.info: Futuristic worlds, technology, space exploration, and advanced science.

genres.name: Romance
genres.info: Stories about love, relationships, emotions, and personal connection.

genres.name: Historical Fiction
genres.info: Stories set in the past, mixing history with fictional characters.

genres.name: Non Fiction
genres.info: Informative books based on real events, facts, people, or topics.

genres.name: Thriller
genres.info: Suspenseful stories full of tension, danger, and unexpected twists.

genres.name: Drama
genres.info: Emotional stories focused on conflict, personal struggles, and relationships.

genres.name: Fantasy
genres.info: Magical worlds, mythical creatures, quests, and imaginary adventures.
